title: Standardize pilot dataset -> CELLxGENE-schema .h5ad + QC report
context: M1 pilot standardization to CELLxGENE schema with a QC report and complete provenance. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Standardize the pilot dataset into a CELLxGENE-schema .h5ad with a QC report and complete, reproducible provenance.
acceptanceCriteria: Output passes cellxgene-schema validate in CI.
Gene IDs normalized to HGNC/Ensembl; obs/var fields ontology-mapped (CL/UBERON/MONDO).
QC report (cells, genes, mito%, doublet handling) included; thresholds documented.
Provenance JSONL complete (source -> transforms -> output hash); pipeline re-runs reproducibly.
